description: Agent-facing tool/function schemas for JarvisVR. Group (a) widget tools (x_action='spawn') are derived from registry.json; group (b) utility tools (arrange_holograms/close_hologram/update_hologram). Strip x_* keys before sending to an LLM if your provider rejects unknown fields.

tools.name: show_weather
tools.description: Weather Orb: A floating, glanceable orb showing current conditions for a city, with an optional multi-day forecast that expands on tap. Produces a 'weather_orb' hologram (holo.spawn).

city.description: City or location name to display.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_chart
tools.description: 3D Chart: A volumetric data chart (bar, line, scatter, pie, or surface) with one or more series, axis labels, and selectable data points. Produces a 'chart_3d' hologram (holo.spawn).

labels.description: Category labels for the primary axis.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: open_model_viewer
tools.description: 3D Model Viewer: Loads and displays a 3D model (glTF/GLB/OBJ/FBX) that the user can grab, spin, and scale; supports auto-rotate and named animations. Produces a 'model_viewer' hologram (holo.spawn).

name.description: Display name / caption for the model.

format.description: Asset format hint for the loader.

auto_rotate.description: Continuously spin the model when idle.

animation.description: Name of an embedded animation clip to play.

scale_factor.description: Uniform scale applied to the loaded model.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_panel
tools.description: Info Panel: A flat glass/solid panel for rich text content organized into optional sections; the workhorse container for readable information. Produces a 'panel' hologram (holo.spawn).

body.description: Primary body text (plain or lightweight markdown).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_text
tools.description: Text Label: A lightweight floating text primitive for captions, headings, and annotations anchored in space. Produces a 'text_label' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_button
tools.description: Button: A pressable holographic button that emits an event on tap or dwell; used for confirmations and quick actions. Produces a 'button' hologram (holo.spawn).

icon.description: Optional icon id from the client icon set.

action_id.description: Semantic id echoed back in the press event so the agent knows what was invoked.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: start_timer
tools.description: Timer: A countdown or stopwatch with play/pause/reset controls; emits control events the agent reacts to. Produces a 'timer' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: play_media
tools.description: Media Player: Plays an audio or video source with transport controls and a scrubber; emits play/pause, seek, and volume events. Produces a 'media_player' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_map
tools.description: 3D Map: An interactive tilted 3D map centered on a coordinate, with markers, zoom, and pan; emits marker selection and navigation events. Produces a 'map_3d' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_smart_home
tools.description: Smart Home Panel: Controls a group of smart-home devices (lights, thermostat, locks, plugs, etc.) with toggles and sliders; emits device control events. Produces a 'smart_home_panel' hologram (holo.spawn).

devices.description: Devices shown and controllable in this panel.

state.description: Current device state. Common keys below; device-specific keys are allowed.

level.description: Generic level 0-100 (e.g. brightness, volume, blind position).

unit.description: Optional unit for the device's primary value, e.g. 'C' or '%'.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_todo_list
tools.description: To-do List: A checkable list of tasks with optional priorities; emits toggle and selection events as the user checks items off. Produces a 'todo_list' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_image_board
tools.description: Image Board: A grid, carousel, or stack of images with captions; emits selection/navigation events as the user browses. Produces a 'image_board' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: annotate_object
tools.description: Vision Annotation: A world-anchored callout that labels a real object Jarvis recognizes, with optional confidence, detail text, and a leader line to the target. Produces a 'vision_annotation' hologram (holo.spawn).

leader_line.description: Draw a line from the callout to the target.

target_object_id.description: Object/anchor id of the real object being annotated.

target_position.description: World position of the target point (meters).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: draw_bounding_box
tools.description: 3D Bounding Box: A volumetric box drawn around a detected real-world object, with a label and confidence. Produces a 'bounding_box_3d' hologram (holo.spawn).

size.description: Box extents [width, height, depth] in meters.

filled.description: Render translucent faces instead of just edges.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_live_caption
tools.description: Live Captions: A rolling caption panel that displays speech Jarvis hears in real time (ambient transcript / translation). Produces a 'live_caption' hologram (holo.spawn).

max_lines.description: How many lines to keep visible.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the captions.

translated.description: True if these captions are a translation.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_vision_feed
tools.description: Vision Feed: A small panel showing what Jarvis currently sees through the passthrough camera, with detection overlays and a freeze control. Produces a 'vision_feed' hologram (holo.spawn).

frame_url.description: URL/data-uri of the latest frame snapshot.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: drop_scene_label
tools.description: Scene Label: A lightweight pin/label dropped at a point in the room (e.g. spatial-memory markers like 'keys last seen here'). Produces a 'scene_label' hologram (holo.spawn).

pin.description: Show a pin/dot anchor under the label.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_clock
tools.description: Clock: A floating analog or digital clock for a given timezone. Produces a 'clock' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_world_clock
tools.description: World Clock: Several clocks for different cities/timezones at a glance. Produces a 'world_clock' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_calendar
tools.description: Calendar: A calendar/agenda surface showing events for a day, week, or month. Produces a 'calendar' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_stocks
tools.description: Stocks Ticker: A scrolling ticker of stock/crypto symbols with prices and percentage changes. Produces a 'stocks_ticker' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_news
tools.description: News Feed: A scrollable feed of news headlines with sources and summaries. Produces a 'news_feed' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_translator
tools.description: Translator: A live translation panel for text, conversation, or signs read from the camera. Produces a 'translator' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_recipe
tools.description: Recipe Card: A step-by-step cooking card with ingredients, timings, and a current-step highlight. Produces a 'recipe_card' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: open_whiteboard
tools.description: Whiteboard: A free-form sketch surface the user can draw on with hand strokes. Produces a 'whiteboard' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_sticky_note
tools.description: Sticky Note: A colored sticky note that can be placed and pinned in space. Produces a 'sticky_note' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_code
tools.description: Code Viewer: A syntax-highlighted code panel with optional line highlighting and copy. Produces a 'code_viewer' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_document
tools.description: Document Viewer: A paged document viewer for PDFs, markdown, or text. Produces a 'document_viewer' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_web
tools.description: Web Panel: An interactive browser surface that renders a web page in space. Produces a 'web_panel' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_avatar
tools.description: Jarvis Avatar: Jarvis's visual presence (orb/face/ring) that reflects agent state and emotion. Produces a 'avatar' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_navigation
tools.description: Navigation Arrow: A wayfinding arrow/beam pointing toward a destination, with distance and ETA. Produces a 'navigation_arrow' hologram (holo.spawn).

direction.description: Unit direction vector to the destination.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_health_ring
tools.description: Health Rings: Activity/fitness rings showing progress toward daily goals. Produces a 'health_ring' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_music_visualizer
tools.description: Music Visualizer: An audio-reactive 3D visualizer with now-playing info. Produces a 'music_visualizer' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_graph
tools.description: Network Graph: A 3D node/edge graph for relationships, networks, or knowledge graphs. Produces a 'graph_3d' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_data_table
tools.description: Data Table: A scrollable, sortable table of rows and columns. Produces a 'data_table' hologram (holo.spawn).

rows.description: Each row maps column key -> value (open object; keys match columns).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: measure
tools.description: Measuring Tape: A spatial measurement tool that reports distance, area, or angle between placed points. Produces a 'measuring_tape' hologram (holo.spawn).

points.description: World-space points [x, y, z] in meters.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: start_pomodoro
tools.description: Pomodoro Timer: A focus/break Pomodoro timer with session tracking and controls. Produces a 'pomodoro' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_generated_image
tools.description: AI Image Viewer: Displays AI-generated images with the prompt, generation status, and progress. Produces a 'image_gen_viewer' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_globe
tools.description: Volumetric Globe: An interactive 3D Earth with markers and great-circle arcs. Produces a 'volumetric_globe' hologram (holo.spawn).

highlight_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2/3 country code to highlight.

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_system_launcher
tools.description: System Launcher: An app/widget launcher grid for opening JarvisVR apps and tools. Produces a 'system_launcher' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: notify
tools.description: Notification Toast: A transient notification banner with severity, optional actions, and auto-dismiss. Produces a 'notification_toast' hologram (holo.spawn).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: show_settings
tools.description: Settings Panel: A grouped settings surface with toggles, sliders, selects, and buttons. Produces a 'settings_panel' hologram (holo.spawn).

value.description: Current value (boolean, number, or string depending on type).

anchor.description: Optional anchor override (defaults to the widget's default_transform.anchor).

position.description: Optional position [x, y, z] in meters relative to the anchor.

billboard.description: Optional: if true, the widget always faces the user.

tools.name: arrange_holograms
tools.description: Arrange existing holograms into a spatial layout (arc, grid, stack, or free). Maps to holo.layout.

tools.name: close_hologram
tools.description: Remove a hologram from the scene. Maps to holo.destroy.

object_id.description: Id of the object to remove.

tools.name: update_hologram
tools.description: Patch the props and/or transform of an existing hologram. Maps to holo.update.

props.description: Partial props patch (validated against the object's widget schema).
